parameterGroups.label: Delay Time
parameterGroups.rationale: Left/right delay times with shared tempo sync toggle

parameters.name: Delay Time Left
parameters.description: Left channel delay time in milliseconds or tempo-synced note value when sync is enabled

parameters.name: Delay Time Right
parameters.description: Right channel delay time in milliseconds or tempo-synced note value when sync is enabled

parameters.name: Tempo Sync
parameters.description: Enables tempo-synced delay times instead of milliseconds

parameters.name: Feedback Left
parameters.description: Left channel feedback amount where 0.0 is no repeats and 1.0 is infinite

parameters.name: Feedback Right
parameters.description: Right channel feedback amount where 0.0 is no repeats and 1.0 is infinite

parameterGroups.label: Filter
parameterGroups.rationale: Low-pass and high-pass filters shape the feedback tone

parameters.name: Low-Pass Frequency
parameters.description: Low-pass cutoff frequency applied to the delay feedback

parameters.name: High-Pass Frequency
parameters.description: High-pass cutoff frequency applied to the delay feedback

parameters.name: Mix
parameters.description: Dry and wet balance where 0.0 is fully dry and 1.0 is fully wet

gaps.question: What is the complete processing order in applyEffect()? Specifically: input -> delay line write -> feedback -> filter -> delay line read -> mix -> output?
gaps.context: Need to understand the exact signal flow for the pseudo-code.

gaps.question: Are the low-pass and high-pass filters applied within the feedback loop (filtering the feedback signal) or on the wet output? Are they applied in series?
gaps.context: Filter placement determines whether repeats get progressively darker/thinner.

gaps.question: What happens when delay time changes? Is there a crossfade to prevent clicks? If so, what is the crossfade length?
gaps.context: Users need to know if delay time automation is safe.

gaps.question: When TempoSync is enabled, what note values are available? How is the parameter range mapped to note divisions?
gaps.context: Need to document available tempo sync options.

gaps.question: How is the Mix parameter applied? Linear crossfade, equal-power, or something else?
gaps.context: Affects how the dry/wet balance behaves perceptually.

gaps.question: What is the maximum delay buffer size? Does the 3000ms range represent the actual maximum?
gaps.context: Users need to know the maximum delay time available.

gaps.question: Is the delay line processing per-sample or per-block? What interpolation method is used for fractional delay?

notes: Delay has tempo sync (TempoSync defaults to On). The delay times have 'dynamic' defaults, likely set from the host tempo. No modulation chains are exposed. Known batch relationship: shares delay-line topology with Chorus and PhaseFX.
